item_titles: Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark
Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
[AINews] Kimi K3 2.8T-A50B: the largest open model ever released; Opus 4.8-class at Sonnet 5 pricing
Kimi's open model K3 nears GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5 while signaling the end of super cheap Chinese AI
clusters.summary: 月之暗面发布了拥有2.8万亿参数的开源模型Kimi K3，其性能逼近GPT-5.6和Claude Opus 4.8等顶级闭源模型。
clusters.title: 月之暗面发布最大开源模型Kimi K3

item_titles: Connect more of your apps to Search
Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
Google rebrands NotebookLM as Gemini Notebook and opens its search app to third-party integration
clusters.summary: Google将NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook，并宣布其AI搜索模式支持连接并交互第三方应用，拓展了任务处理能力。
clusters.title: Google将NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook并向第三方应用开放搜索

item_titles: [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
Ex-OpenAI CTO Murati's Thinking Machines drops Inkling, a 975B parameter model that leads US labs but trails China
Inkling: Our open-weights model
clusters.summary: 由前OpenAI首席技术官Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab发布了其首个开源权重模型Inkling，拥有9750亿参数。
clusters.title: 前OpenAI CTO Murati的Thinking Machines发布975B参数开源模型Inkling

item_titles: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
clusters.summary: Google Vids更新了功能，用户现在可以利用Gemini Omni创建个性化的AI数字人，并主演自己生成的AI视频。
clusters.title: Google Vids推出个性化AI数字人功能

item_titles: OpenAI wants developers to stop typing commands and start using a joystick to control their AI agents
Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?

clusters.title: OpenAI发布Codex Micro硬件控制器及ChatGPT周边产品

item_titles: Ask HN: I feel like I've lost my identity due to AI

clusters.summary: 该论文提出了一种名为内省微调（IFT）的方法，探讨并训练小型语言模型检测和报告其内部激活的扰动。

item_titles: How Artificial Intelligence LLM Engines Shape the Global Conflict Information Environment
clusters.summary: 该论文探讨了人工智能问答引擎在和平与冲突等全球议题上，对分析师和公众信息环境产生的影响。
clusters.title: AI大模型引擎如何塑造全球冲突信息环境

item_titles: Capability from Access Structure, Not Scale: Lower Bounds and Pre-Registered Tests for Hybrid Sequence Models
clusters.summary: 该论文探讨了混合序列模型的能力来源，指出其能力更多取决于访问结构而非单纯的模型规模。
clusters.title: 能力源于访问结构而非规模：混合序列模型的下界
